rationale: A systems-level evaluation of edge vs cloud latency/bandwidth trade-offs before making the strategic architecture decision.
Calculating the exact duration or memory high-water mark during a rolling deployment of a 7B model across multiple nodes.
Designing a hybrid or dynamic batching mechanism that automatically balances static batching latency constraints with optimal GPU throughput.
Designing an automated pipeline to execute and score LLM-based red teaming prompts against a target model in a sandbox environment.
Analyzing cache thrashing and diagnosing latency spikes when multiple models are evicted simultaneously under bursty traffic.
Profiling a multi-stage inference pipeline to pinpoint exactly which CPU/GPU handoff is starving the bottleneck stage.
Configuring the optimal hedged request delay threshold to minimize tail latency without triggering a retry storm.
Implementing a dynamic alerting threshold based on historical anomaly distributions rather than static bounds.
Diagnosing API gateway timeout failures caused by the queuing delay while CPU spillover instances boot during a sudden traffic spike.
Estimating the monthly cloud bill for a simple 24/7 LLM inference endpoint given request volume and instance costs.
An L4 question requiring the diagnosis of a simulated network failure or congestion event in an Ultra Ethernet fabric compared to RoCEv2, preparing for the L5 architecture choice.
An L2 question bridging the high-level bandwidths of NVLink/PCIe and the specific PCIe bottleneck stall, focusing on calculating the theoretical PCIe transfer time for small tensors.
An L5 question asking students to evaluate and redesign the PCIe topology (e.g., PLX switches vs dual-socket CPU lanes) for an 8-GPU system to prevent host-to-device starvation.
Evaluating and comparing distributed join architectures (e.g., sort-merge vs broadcast vs skewed-join optimizations) to handle extreme skew before it causes OOMs.
Diagnosing vocabulary expansion bottlenecks and out-of-memory errors caused by the quadratic scaling of softmax layers in LLM tokenizers.
Diagnosing silent training-serving skew by implementing real-time feature logging and comparing online distributions against offline training baselines.
Diagnosing high-throughput storage latency and IOPS bottlenecks in synchronous append-only audit logging pipelines.
Diagnosing federated learning gradient leakage vulnerability by empirically analyzing the impact of batch sizes and layer structures on reconstruction success.
Evaluating the trade-offs of covariance pruning defenses compared to robust training or certified filtering for mitigating backdoor attacks.
Diagnosing why a theoretical Young-Daly interval fails in practice due to non-uniform failure distributions or variable checkpoint latencies.
Understanding how dynamic worker groups function during a node failure or preemption before performing batch scaling calculations.
Diagnosing why actual cluster goodput degrades beyond theoretical MTBF estimates due to hidden overheads like recovery time and stragglers.
Diagnosing production false positives or latency bottlenecks caused by prompt injection classifiers.
Understanding the mechanism of SEC-DED ECC in GPU memory and how correctable vs uncorrectable errors affect job state.
A conceptual application identifying which parts of a specific graph can be safely constant-folded before calculating wasted FLOPs.
A conceptual explanation of how an auto-tuner generates and profiles candidate tiling configurations before quantifying the search space.
An evaluation of how to restrict the search space for complex sparse operations using heuristic pruning before moving to full auto-tuner design.
Calculate the extra memory requirements or step time associated with gradient accumulation before diagnosing distributed overheads.
Diagnosing why a custom parameter failed to update during training due to incorrect registration before addressing serialization.
Diagnosing a memory or performance bottleneck when applying vmap to a complex model before making a framework-level decision.
A question requiring the candidate to diagnose a caching or bandwidth bottleneck when serving Zipfian distributed embeddings across PCIe and HBM before they can design the hot-cold partitioning.
A question analyzing an SSM's specific memory utilization or throughput bottleneck during inference compared to a Transformer on a concrete hardware accelerator.
A question evaluating the runtime latency and memory bandwidth impact of computing dynamic positional encodings like RoPE versus reading absolute encodings during autoregressive decoding.
A question calculating the exact rate of memory bloat or latency scaling as the perception processing deficit compounds over time.
Analyzing the calibration process for INT8 post-training quantization and the trade-off between throughput gains and precision loss.
Analyzing the memory access patterns and arithmetic intensity of attention mechanisms compared to convolutions.
Profiling and quantifying the exact memory bandwidth starvation caused by multi-head attention on edge SoCs.
Diagnosing a communication bottleneck or OOM issue specific to a ZeRO stage transition.
Diagnosing a memory or performance bottleneck when fine-tuning with QLoRA on a constrained GPU.
Calculating the exact memory footprint breakdown of FP32 master weights vs FP16 weights and Adam states.

A conceptual question explaining how a model's theoretical arithmetic intensity dictates memory bus utilization and introduces cache dependency, bridging basic roofline theory to empirical cache miss profiling.
Analyze the queuing delay or P99 latency impact of mixing short 1K and long 32K token requests in a single shared queue before proposing a partitioned architecture.
Identify the specific software or pipeline bottleneck that accounts for the gap between a micro-benchmark bandwidth result and the end-to-end macro-benchmark.
Diagnose an ML production outage caused by a missing test in the ML Test Score framework (e.g. no feature monitoring).
Profiling the resource contention and OS-level preemption overhead when an LLM inference task shares the NPU/GPU with mission-critical UI rendering.
Understanding why the auto-regressive decoding phase of an LLM is inherently memory-bandwidth bound due to the low arithmetic intensity of token-by-token generation.
Explaining the specific latency and bandwidth differences between off-chip HBM and on-chip SRAM, motivating the necessity of tiling attention matrices.
A basic calculation of the raw per-token FLOPs for an MoE architecture based on its routing and expert dimensions.
An architectural evaluation of near-miss safety logging that balances cellular payload cost against privacy before exploring complex hybrids.
A diagnostic question analyzing why linear learning rate scaling breaks down during a specific mid-training loss spike when pushing beyond critical batch limits.

A conceptual question explaining how sequence parallelism (Ring Attention) physically splits the KV cache across multiple GPUs to bridge standard single-GPU SRAM tiling (L3) to million-token distributed topologies (L5).
A question explaining the mechanics of dynamic loss scaling to bridge the theoretical memory budget of FP16 (L2) to diagnosing underflow errors when scaling fails (L4).
A question calculating the basic L3 cache hit rate needed to sustain an INT4 model's throughput before evaluating the more complex effective bandwidth equations required at L4.
Needs a diagnostic or troubleshooting scenario involving an unanticipated power trip or voltage drop specifically caused by transient AllReduce spikes.
Needs a scenario diagnosing an unexpected latency spike or OOM during dynamic paged allocation before designing the full architectural solution.
Requires a foundational estimation question on shared memory constraints specific to Android SoC NPUs before jumping into troubleshooting exhaustion.
Needs a diagnostic question where a mobile ML feature breaks OS accessibility services, requiring an architectural fix for asynchronous inference state updates.
Needs a troubleshooting scenario where an automotive LLM fails latency SLAs due to memory bandwidth contention, bridging the gap between sizing and full system orchestration.
Needs a diagnostic scenario bridging user-facing lag with the underlying dynamic batching metrics on the NPU.
An L2 question evaluating the memory footprint of NAS-discovered model candidates against strict microcontroller constraints.
An L4 question requiring the design of a cost-optimized cloud aggregation architecture to minimize the infrastructure overhead of federated learning.
An L5 question addressing advanced gradient compression or asynchronous aggregation strategies to mitigate stragglers before reaching the H100 scaling peak.
Estimating basic communication time versus compute time for a typical edge federated learning training round.
Calculating the dynamic memory impact of varying context lengths alongside a quantized model footprint.
Analyzing memory bandwidth limits and cache hit rates specifically for depthwise separable convolutions on mobile GPUs.
Redesigning a vision pipeline to deliberately shift its operational intensity above the NPU's ridge point.
Profiling KV cache dataflow patterns during autoregressive generation on inference-only accelerators.
Designing a caching scheme to reduce host-device bandwidth when continuously streaming the KV cache.
Re-architecting the self-attention processing for long sequences to fit strictly within Edge TPU SRAM limits.
Evaluate the cost trade-offs of purchasing carbon offsets versus relocating the training workload to a region with greener but more expensive electricity.
Calculate the theoretical parameter and FLOP reduction when converting a standard CNN block to use depthwise separable convolutions before analyzing the practical hardware trade-offs.
Apply M/M/1 queueing formulas to calculate the exact utilization threshold at which a Jetson Orin pipeline's wait time exceeds a real-time 100ms deadline.
Evaluate the precise memory bandwidth and PCIe overhead required to stream intermediate activations between a host processor and an edge NPU.
A troubleshooting or calculation question on memory profiling long-context models on A100 before designing the full optimization architecture.
A diagnostic scenario identifying specific OS or framework initialization steps that cause variable warm-up times before addressing general inference jitter.
A question on calculating basic supercapacitor charge and discharge cycles under a constant solar harvest rate before introducing complex inference duty cycle budgets.
A calculation of the zero-point offset computational overhead introduced by asymmetric quantization compared to symmetric quantization.
A diagnostic question focused on identifying early warning signs of RDMA Queue Pair exhaustion before it causes cluster-wide hangs.
A system design question evaluating how to dynamically scale the prefill and decode pools independently based on real-time SLO metrics.
An architectural evaluation of how liquid cooling and rack layout decisions directly influence the achievable Power Usage Effectiveness (PUE) at scale.
An introductory analysis of how explicit congestion notification (ECN) thresholds affect switch buffer behavior prior to implementing full DCQCN.
A conceptual exploration of why historical feature joins require point-in-time alignment to prevent data leakage in offline training sets.

A scenario requiring the evaluation of facility plumbing retrofits, secondary loop capacity, and cooling distribution unit (CDU) sizing to transition an air-cooled cluster to the proposed direct liquid cooling system.

A scenario requiring the design of an isolation policy or priority weighting scheme for a shared TPU v5e pod to balance the interference between latency-sensitive interactive tasks and high-throughput batch training.

A scenario that bridges basic heterogeneous workload isolation and advanced kernel-level dynamic batching, focusing on scheduling heuristics for highly variable sequence lengths that exhaust KV cache capacity.
A scenario requiring the orchestration of node cordoning and automated pod migration at the cluster level to safely drain active GPUs without violating P99 latency budgets during maintenance.

A scenario connecting multi-stage latency budgets to the broader full-stack architecture, focusing on the cache invalidation and state synchronization required between retrieval and heavy ranking services under strict SLOs.
An L5 question is needed to bridge evaluating an LLM's thermal budget (L4) and optimizing its hardware-specific execution to stay under it (L6+).
An L4 question on scheduling PCIe DMA transfers alongside compute kernels to bridge basic hardware awareness (L3) and advanced TMA usage (L5).
An L4 question connecting column-parallel fundamentals to Megatron's sequence parallelism optimizations.
An L2 question calculating memory bandwidth contention for a single image to bridge basic uplink metrics and LPDDR5X shared bus analysis.
An L5 question on optimizing memory allocation across concurrent models to bridge basic multi-camera deployments and advanced Triton dynamic batching.
Calculating memory bandwidth requirements for intermediate activations prior to understanding how graph fusion optimizes them.
Analyzing the specific latency overhead of a single JIT recompilation event during inference with dynamic shapes.
Analyze the power-performance trade-offs of applying operator fusion to mitigate memory bandwidth limits before implementing a full QoS memory scheme.
Design a state recovery protocol that evaluates the integrity of the most recent checkpoint before resuming execution.
Explain how data is fed into a systolic array, detailing the difference between memory bandwidth and MAC array throughput.
Calculate the necessary watchdog timeout period when given the worst-case execution time of a neural network layer.
Develop a multi-stage queueing model to isolate the exact source of tail latency amplification before applying admission control.
A question calculating exact KV-cache scaling bottlenecks on Cloud AI 100 before architectural mitigations are introduced.
A question evaluating SRAM tiling strategies to prevent thrashing before exploring aggressive compiler-level kernel fusion spills.
A question analyzing the power consumption of an individual model update cycle before examining a fleet-wide battery failure.
A question requiring the calculation of specific pipeline communication overheads or bubble sizes in a 3D parallel H100 deployment.
A question identifying standard memory bandwidth bottlenecks during draft verification before diagnosing severe latency regressions on A100.
A question calculating the exact performance penalty of USB fallback for unfused operations on the Edge TPU before making architectural tradeoff decisions.
A question requiring the calculation of compound tail latency probabilities across sequential microservices before assigning explicit SLO budgets.
Design an optimal static memory layout for the nRF5340 that partitions remaining SRAM between the RTOS, BLE stack buffers, and the required ML tensor arena.
Design a granular recovery strategy that detects exploding activations (NaNs) and gracefully resets the inference session without triggering an OS-level application crash or hard reboot.
Design an automated HIL (Hardware-in-the-Loop) CI/CD stage that measures edge target latency to detect performance regressions caused by poor INT8 operator mapping before OTA deployment.
Calculate the memory boundaries and necessary buffer persistence when switching sequentially between two pre-compiled TinyML models sharing a single flat tensor arena.
A question bridging Ethos-U55 fallback latency analysis and fallback delegation strategy by exploring intermediate compilation bottlenecks.
A scenario handling ONNX-to-TFLM operator gaps at a system level before full optimization on the ESP32-S3.
A question calculating runtime overheads or compiling custom ops for nRF5340 before comparing with AOT.
A basic sizing exercise comparing PCIe and NVLink bandwidth limits before applying them to checkpointing scenarios.
Analyzes the impact of differential staging on host memory bandwidth and performance degradation during OTA updates.
Evaluating specific hard-negative mining strategies and edge-case selections on the Ethos-U55.
Basic dataset feature sizing for ESP32-S3 PSRAM capacity.
